title: Smart Elytra
description: Smart Elytra lets you swap between flight and armor with a single keypress (G). Featuring a server-safe 3-tick sync method (switch > equip > return), it ensures reliable performance and bypasses anti-cheat issues on multiplayer servers.
body:
# **🦅 Smart Elytra (Hotbar-Sync)**

Smart Elytra is a specialized utility mod for Fabric 1.21, engineered for maximum reliability on multiplayer servers. Forget fumbling through your inventory or wasting precious hotbar time—swap between flight and combat readiness with a single, intelligent keypress.

## **✨ Key Features**

### **⚡ 3-Tick Hotbar Logic:**
To prevent Anti-Cheat flags and "ghost items," the mod executes the swap in three precise steps:

**Tick 1:** Switches to the item's hotbar slot.

**Tick 2:** Equips the item via right-click simulation.

**Tick 3:** Instantly returns to your original selected slot.

### **🛡️ Best-Armor Detection:**
Automatically scans your hotbar for the strongest chestplate (Netherite > Diamond > Iron, etc.) when swapping out of your Elytra.

### **🌐 Server-Optimized:** 
Built to handle latency and lag. By spreading actions across game ticks, it mimics natural player behavior, making it safe for most PvP and survival servers.

### **⌨️ Fully Bindable:**
The default key is 'G', which can be changed anytime in the Minecraft controls menu under the 'Misc' category.

## **🎮 How to Use**

Place your Elytra or your Chestplate into any slot of your Hotbar.

Press G (default) to trigger the swap.

The mod handles the rotation and equipping in a fraction of a second.

### **📦 Installation**

Requires Fabric Loader and Fabric API.

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.
